final_prompt.prompt:
Design a PPT cover slide for the "长安起源Q06" vehicle launch announcement (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "通透震撼" aesthetic with automotive premium brand tone — references in the spirit of Polestar minimalist product photography, Audi e-tron launch campaign visual language, Chinese EV brand NIO's clean tech aesthetic; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include prominent title and subtitle placement for PPT cover format
Subject: must include "长安起源Q06" as the primary subject
Scene/backdrop: needs an open, immersive backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a premium, aspirational atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that aligns with automotive premium brand identity — exact values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" (title), with supporting subtitle placement
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve "长安起源Q06" brand name and "9月上市" launch timing
Avoid:
